description: Create a CodeQL GitHub Actions workflow that analyzes code in C++, Python, and JavaScript. The workflow should trigger on push events to master and maint branches, on pull requests to the master branch, and on a scheduled basis every Tuesday at 07:43. Use an ubuntu-latest job that checks out the repository, initializes CodeQL for the specified languages, and performs the CodeQL analysis. Optionally build C++ code using cmake and make if autobuild fails.
